items.title: Oil price soars above $118 after reports of 'extended' Iran blockade
items.summary: The price of crude oil has swung sharply as uncertainty over the war in the Middle East continues.

items.title: New images show suspect taking selfies before Washington press dinner shooting
items.summary: Prosecutors argue Cole Tomas Allen should remain in custody until trial on a charge of attempted assassination of President Donald Trump.

items.title: Seven lawsuits filed against OpenAI by families of Canada mass-shooting victims
items.summary: The lawsuits, filed in California, accuse OpenAI and Sam Altman of negligence and abetting a mass shooting by failing to flag the suspect's ChatGPT activity.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 倫敦兩猶太男性遭刺傷　警方定調為恐怖主義事件
items.summary: 兩名猶太男性今天在英國倫敦街頭遭刺傷，警方認定這起事件屬於恐怖主義行徑，並以謀殺未遂罪嫌逮捕一名45歲男性。這也是倫敦近期最新一宗反猶太仇恨攻擊。  美聯社報導，倫敦都會區警察局表示，這起發...…

items.title: 美五角大廈首曝戰爭帳單！攻伊朗燒掉7900億 逾半用於彈藥
items.summary: 美國五角大廈財務官員29日在國會首次公布官方數據，證實與伊朗的戰爭估計已耗資高達250億美元（約新台幣7906億元），多數用於彈藥消耗。  綜合美聯社與路透報導，這場未經...…

items.title: 烏克蘭無人機深入俄境1500公里夜襲 澤倫斯基：續擴打擊縱深
items.summary: 烏克蘭指出，其無人機於夜間深入俄羅斯境內1500公里，襲擊烏拉山脈（Ural Mountains）附近一座輸油泵站。總統澤倫斯基表示，基輔將會繼續擴大打擊縱深。  路透社報導，國際油價受...…
